# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:  # Define stages in your CI/CD process, e.g., 'build', 'test' etc... (optional)
- test1   // Stage name for testing the build script and commands used by developers to customize them(required). You can define multiple stage names if needed.(Optional)
+ setup    // This is where you set up your environment before running any scripts. It could be a cleanup, installation of dependencies etc... (optional but recommended as it helps prevent CI/CD security issues.) 
- deploy   // Stage name for deployment(required). You can define multiple stage names if needed.(Optional)
+ build    // This is where you run your custom commands to create the product. It could be a multi-stage process, or just one command depending on how complex it gets (optional but recommended as this allows flexibility and makes CI/CD more manageable.)
